creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-01-12 16:15:03 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/trac-wysiwyg     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-message 
                         pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This plugin provides a wiki WYSIWYG editor that generates Trac
  wiki markup. This enables users to switch between the WYSIWYG mode
  and the standard wiki markup format, as needed.
  
  WWW: http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/TracWysiwygPlugin
  
  PR:             ports/119571
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin at sourcehosting.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1944    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +33 -0     ports/www/trac-wysiwyg/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/trac-wysiwyg/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/www/trac-wysiwyg/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/www/trac-wysiwyg/pkg-message (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/www/trac-wysiwyg/pkg-plist (new)
